title: Brabantia Sort & Go Food Waste Bin 3L (Light Grey), Space-Efficient Plastic Recycle Bin with Handle, Removable and Stay-Open Lid, Easy to Clean Kitchen Compost Caddy without Nooks and Rims
features: Space efficient - This Brabantia bin with XXS volume (3L) fits perfectly anywhere, even on your worktop, drawer or on the wall (bracket sold separately), suitable for a single-person household
Quick emptying - The kitchen bin includes an integrated carrying handle, a stay-open removable lid, and a bottom grip, making it easy to clean or empty in your compost heap or waste container
Separating sorted - This XXS rubbish bin with one compartment is ideal for throwing away peels, scraps, leftovers and all organic kitchen waste
No visible bin bag overwrap - Can be used with or without a bin liner, the top trim hides the bin bag when the lid is closed, matching 100% compostable bin liners available (code A)
More sustainable choice - Brabantia Sort & Go Compost Bin is Cradle-to-Cradle certified (Silver level), made of plastic and is 100% recyclable after use (with 10-year guarantee)
